## The job to be done

<!-- What are you trying to accomplish? Why does this matter to you?  e.g. "I send PDFs to a govt portal weekly. The portal accepts max 250KB but Grabio's smallest preset is 200KB or 1MB — I want a custom target." -->

## What would the ideal flow look like

<!-- Walk through the taps. e.g. Tap Share → Grabio → Compress → Custom KB → enter 250 -->

## Have you tried anything else for this?

<!-- Other apps, other Shortcuts, online tools. What worked / didn't -->

## How often would you use it?

- [ ] Daily
- [ ] Weekly
- [ ] Monthly
- [ ] One-off

## Anything else

<!-- Mockups, screenshots, links to similar tools, edge cases -->

---

🗳 If this resonates with you, drop a 👍 — features with the most upvotes jump the queue.
